name: global-ai-coding-setup
description: Personal global config for Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Codex — installs to your home directory and applies to all projects on your machine

files.description: Global Claude Code preferences: model, permissions, and behavior defaults
Global instructions Claude Code reads for every project
Global /commit slash command: generates conventional commit messages
Global Gemini CLI preferences: model, sandbox, and display settings
Global Codex configuration: model, approval mode, and history settings
